info.name: School Management API
info.description:
Complete API collection for School Management System.

Endpoints:
- POST /addSchool — Add a new school
- GET /listSchools — List schools sorted by proximity

Base URL: http://localhost:3000

For production, replace the base URL with your hosted endpoint.

variable.description: Change to your hosted URL for production testing

request.description: Verify the API server is running and see available endpoints.

Add a new school with valid name, address, latitude, and longitude.

**Expected Response:** 201 Created with the newly inserted school object.

response.name: 201 - School Added

request.description:
Test validation — missing address, latitude, longitude.

**Expected Response:** 400 Bad Request with validation errors.

response.name: 400 - Validation Error

request.description:
Test coordinate range validation. Latitude must be -90 to 90, longitude -180 to 180.

**Expected Response:** 400 Bad Request.
Add a school in Mumbai to test multi-city proximity sorting.

Fetch all schools sorted by distance from New Delhi (28.6139, 77.2090).

Schools geographically closer to New Delhi will appear first.

**Expected Response:** 200 OK with sorted array including distance_km.

response.name: 200 - Sorted Schools List
response.body:

request.description: Fetch all schools sorted by proximity to Mumbai. Schools in Mumbai will appear first.

Test validation — no query params provided.

**Expected Response:** 400 Bad Request with validation errors.

response.name: 400 - Missing Coordinates

request.description: Fetch schools sorted from Kolkata's perspective.
